ReleaseVolume.volumeId: ID of the disk to be released
ReleaseVolume.autoSnapshot: When set to "on", deletes automatic snapshots associated with the disk
ReleaseVolume.manualSnapshot: When set to "on", deletes manual snapshots associated with the disk
ReleaseVolume.cdsAttributeActive: Whether automatic snapshots are released according to the "release with disk" attribute; defaults to false; when true, releases based on each snapshot's associated release attribute, taking priority over autoSnapshot
ReleaseVolume.recycle: When set to "on", the data disk is moved to the recycle bin; when set to "off", it is immediately deleted; defaults to "on"
